name: Stunt Bike Extreme
author: Poki
description: Stunt Bike Extreme is a driving game that lets you showcase your best motorbike stunt skills! Hop on your favorite bike and navigate through challenging environments like jungles, warehouses, and junkyards. Conquer all kinds of obstacles and race against the clock to set new records. Perform amazing flips during jumps to earn rewards. Upgrade your bike and customize its look to stand out. Are you ready to become the ultimate stunt bike rider? How to play Stunt Bike Extreme? Use the up and down arrow keys or pedals icons to move the bike forward or stop it Use the left and right arrows or the icons in the bottom left to perform flips Who created Stunt Bike Extreme? Stunt Bike Extreme is created by Hyperkani. Play their other games on Poki: Stunt Car Extreme and Stunt Car Challenge 3 ! How can I play Stunt Bike Extreme for free? You can play Stunt Bike Extreme for free on Poki. Can I play Stunt Bike Extreme on mobile devices and desktop? Stunt Bike Extreme can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
